CustomField.description: Calculated end date for status field. Only consider the dates in term if both start/end date in study offering are empty.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL( End_Date__c)) || NOT(ISNULL ( Start_Date__c)), End_Date__c, IF(ISNULL( Academic_Term__r.End_Date__c) && NOT(ISNULL( Academic_Term__r.Start_Date__c)), null, Academic_Term__r.End_Date__c ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated end date for status field. Only consider the dates in term if both start/end date in study offering are empty.
CustomField.label: End Date
